chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1464 of 2016 CP D 1480 of 2016 CP D 1481 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.6601/2016. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. M. Taimoor Qureshi, advocate for the petitioners. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel states that these petitions impugne notices, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. It is stated that the respondent department may be directed to adjudicate the same vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing, however, during pending aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Counsel for the respondents have no cavil to the aforesaid and state that these petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
